feature: ADR Gap Closure — Complete Proposed ADR Implementations
status_note: ALL PHASES COMPLETE (verified 2026-03-21). P1-P4 pre-existing. P5.3 remote_agent+inference_server tables added to SpacetimeDB. P6.1 skill ingestion pre-existing in config_sync.rs. P6.2 skill_selector.rs created. P7-P9 pre-existing. Workplan DONE.
description: Address gaps across 9 proposed ADRs identified during triage. Prioritized by dependency order: foundation (single state) → core infra (project manifest) → agent system (lifecycle, transport) → orchestration (skills, workplans) → governance (review agent, docs). Phases are ordered so each unlocks the next.

phases.name: ADR-051: Eliminate in-memory state in hex-nexus
phases.description: SpacetimeDB becomes the sole state backend. Remove all HashMap-based state from AppState, route all CRUD through SpacetimeDB reducers. This is the foundation — every subsequent phase assumes SpacetimeDB is the single source of truth.

tasks.name: Unify SpacetimeStateAdapter target database
tasks.description: Change SpacetimeStateAdapter to write to `hexflo-coordination` database instead of the separate `hex-nexus` database. Update `.hex/state.json` default database name. Verify: tasks created via MCP appear in dashboard within 1 second.

tasks.name: Eliminate in-memory inference endpoints HashMap
tasks.description: Remove `state.inference_endpoints` HashMap from AppState. All inference CRUD (register, remove, health check) goes through SpacetimeDB `inference-gateway` module reducers. Update routes/secrets.rs (register_inference, remove_inference, check_inference_health) and routes/chat.rs (read provider list).

tasks.name: Eliminate in-memory coordination state
tasks.description: Remove `state.hexflo` (HexFlo struct), `state.instances`, `state.worktree_locks`, `state.task_claims` HashMaps. Replace with thin SpacetimeDB reducer calls in coordination/ module and routes/hexflo.rs, routes/coordination.rs.

tasks.name: Migrate session storage from SQLite to SpacetimeDB
tasks.description: Move chat session storage from SQLite hub.db to SpacetimeDB `chat-relay` module. Add session tables to chat-relay WASM module if not present. Update session routes to use SpacetimeDB reducers.

phases.name: ADR-043: Project manifest and auto-registration
phases.description: Projects auto-register in SpacetimeDB on nexus startup via .hex/project.yaml manifest. Dashboard immediately shows projects without manual REST calls.

tasks.name: Define and parse .hex/project.yaml manifest
tasks.description: Create ProjectManifest struct in hex-core with serde deserialization. Fields: name, description, version, auto_register, agent config, inference servers. Parse .hex/project.yaml on demand.

tasks.name: Auto-register project on nexus startup
tasks.description: In hex-nexus start_server(), after SpacetimeDB connection: read .hex/project.yaml from cwd, if auto_register is true call SpacetimeDB registerProject reducer. Queue and retry if SpacetimeDB not yet connected.

tasks.name: Migrate REST register route to SpacetimeDB
tasks.description: Change POST /api/projects/register to call SpacetimeDB registerProject reducer instead of writing to in-memory HashMap. Keep REST endpoint for CLI compatibility but it becomes a thin proxy to SpacetimeDB.

tasks.name: Scaffold .hex/project.yaml in hex init
tasks.description: Update hex-cli init command to generate a default .hex/project.yaml with project name derived from directory, auto_register: true, and placeholder inference config.

phases.name: ADR-039: Control plane UX enhancements
phases.description: Add the missing control plane features to the SolidJS dashboard: command palette, GUI agent spawning, and code display quality.

tasks.name: Implement command palette (Ctrl+K)
tasks.description: Add a fuzzy-find command palette component to the dashboard. Register available commands from: hex CLI actions, project operations, navigation, agent control. Use a SolidJS dialog with debounced search input.

tasks.name: Add GUI-driven agent spawning
tasks.description: Add 'Spawn Agent' button to project detail view that calls POST /api/agents/spawn with project context. Show agent status in real-time via SpacetimeDB subscription on agent-registry table.

tasks.name: Add syntax-highlighted code display
tasks.description: Integrate Shiki for syntax highlighting in diff views and file browser. Add a CodeBlock component that accepts language and content, renders highlighted output. Wire into existing DiffViewer and file browse views.

phases.name: ADR-037: Default local agent lifecycle
phases.description: hex nexus start automatically spawns a local hex-agent instance. Agent registers via WebSocket, has filesystem access to cwd, and ties its lifecycle to nexus.

tasks.name: Auto-spawn hex-agent on nexus start
tasks.description: In hex-nexus start_server(), after SpacetimeDB connection: spawn hex-agent as a child process with --hub-url pointing to localhost nexus. Track PID for lifecycle management. Add --no-agent flag to skip.

tasks.name: Agent routing in WebSocket handler
tasks.description: Extend /ws/chat handler to route messages based on: @agent-name prefix → specific agent, no prefix → default local agent, no agents → LLM bridge fallback. Update the existing WS message dispatch logic.

tasks.name: Lifecycle management: stop, crash recovery, list
tasks.description: On nexus stop: kill all local agent child processes. On agent crash: mark as dead after 120s without heartbeat, reclaim tasks. Add hex agent list and hex agent kill CLI commands.

phases.name: ADR-040: Remote agent transport (foundation)
phases.description: Enable remote agents to connect to nexus via WebSocket over SSH tunnel. This phase covers tunnel management and the WebSocket agent protocol — not the full spawn-remote flow.

tasks.name: Implement SSH tunnel port (ISshTunnelPort)
tasks.description: Add russh dependency. Implement ISshTunnelPort trait with connect(), health(), reconnect(), disconnect(), list_tunnels(). Support key and ssh-agent auth. Keepalive every 15s, reconnect with exponential backoff.

tasks.name: Define AgentMessage WebSocket protocol
tasks.description: Create the typed AgentMessage enum (Register, RegisterAck, Ping/Pong, TaskAssign, TaskCancel, StreamChunk, TaskComplete, TaskFailed, ToolCall, ToolResult, InferenceRequest/Chunk/Complete) in hex-core domain types.

tasks.name: Add remote agent SpacetimeDB tables
tasks.description: Add RemoteAgent, InferenceServer, and CodeGenTask tables to hexflo-coordination module. Add reducers: register_remote_agent, update_agent_heartbeat, assign_task, complete_task, reassign_task.

tasks.name: Implement hex agent connect CLI command
tasks.description: Add `hex agent connect ws://host:port` command that establishes a WebSocket connection (optionally over SSH tunnel), sends Register message, enters heartbeat loop, and receives task assignments.

phases.name: ADR-042: Skill lifecycle — ingestion and selection
phases.description: Sync filesystem skills into SpacetimeDB on nexus startup. Implement intelligent skill selection at inference time based on triggers, agent scope, and token budget.

tasks.name: Skill ingestion pipeline on nexus startup
tasks.description: On nexus start, scan skills/ and .claude/skills/ directories, parse YAML frontmatter, compute content hash for version detection, call SpacetimeDB skill_registry register_skill reducer for each. Skip unchanged skills (hash match).

tasks.name: Skill selection logic for inference context
tasks.description: Implement skill selection strategy: always_load skills get guaranteed budget (5K tokens), trigger-matched skills share 10K budget, overflow summarized to L1. Query SpacetimeDB skill_registry at inference time.

tasks.name: Add skill CLI commands
tasks.description: Add hex skill list, hex skill sync, hex skill show <name> commands. List reads from SpacetimeDB. Sync triggers re-ingestion. Show displays skill content.

phases.name: ADR-046: Workplan lifecycle — phase gates and reporting
phases.description: Complete the workplan lifecycle with enforced phase gates, git commit correlation, and aggregate reporting.

tasks.name: Enforce phase gates in WorkplanExecutor
tasks.description: After each phase completes, execute the gate command (build, test, analyze). Store result in WorkplanGateResult SpacetimeDB table. Block phase transition if gate fails and blocking: true. Add configurable timeout per gate.

tasks.name: Git commit correlation for workplan tasks
tasks.description: When task_complete is called with commit_sha, store it in WorkplanTask table. Add worktree_branch field. Enable cross-referencing task IDs with commit messages via convention `feat(task-id): ...`.

tasks.name: Aggregate workplan reporting
tasks.description: Add hex plan report <id> CLI command and GET /api/{project_id}/workplan/{id}/report REST endpoint. Returns aggregate: duration, phases completed, tasks completed/failed, commits, agents used, violations introduced.

tasks.name: Dashboard workplan progress view
tasks.description: Add WorkplanProgress component to dashboard. Subscribe to WorkplanExecution and WorkplanTask SpacetimeDB tables. Show phase progress bar, task status grid, and gate results in real-time.

phases.name: ADR-041: ADR review agent (foundation)
phases.description: Build the core ADR review logic: scope conflict detection, supersession chain validation, and stale reference scanning. Defer LLM-powered semantic analysis to a later phase.

tasks.name: Implement ADR review use case (rule-based checks)
tasks.description: Create AdrReviewer struct with five checks: numbering/metadata validation, supersession chain validation, stale reference scanning (grep CLAUDE.md, skills/, agents/ for superseded ADR references). Skip LLM-powered semantic analysis for now — use keyword overlap scoring instead.

tasks.name: Add hex adr review CLI command
tasks.description: Extend hex-cli adr subcommand with `hex adr review [ADR-NNN]` and `hex adr review --strict` (exit non-zero on WARNING+). Output findings as JSON or human-readable table.

phases.name: ADR-047: Internal documentation foundation
phases.description: Create the glossary and system architecture doc. These two files establish canonical terminology and component relationships — the highest-value documentation with the lowest maintenance cost.

tasks.name: Create canonical glossary
tasks.description: Create docs/reference/glossary.md with canonical terminology table: hex, hex-nexus, hex-agent, hex-dashboard, SpacetimeDB, WASM module, reducer, HexFlo, port, adapter, composition root. Include NOT column for deprecated/incorrect terms.

tasks.name: Create system architecture doc
tasks.description: Create docs/reference/system-architecture.md documenting the 5 deployment units (SpacetimeDB, hex-nexus, hex-agent, hex-dashboard, hex clients), their relationships, data flow, and communication channels. Token-efficient format for AI agent consumption.
